arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt interested in bringing Paul Wanner in on loan
arts.sum: Bild reports that Eintracht Frankfurt are interested in bringing Paul Wanner in on loan next season, with the move likely being his final stop before staying at Bayern Munich. Wanner has…

arts.ttl: Kevin Trapp named November Player of the Month
arts.sum: The Eintracht community has voted the team captain as the Mainova Player of the Month, winning a tight race against Hugo Ekitiké and Mario Götze.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Augsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Augsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
